candidates.why: The only explicit D&A row is a generic operating-line 'Depreciation' with no wording tying it to cost of goods/services sold or COGS. Relative to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of goods and services sold'), there is insufficient evidence that this row is a COGS-specific D&A line that should be added to COGS.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown above the financial section. Avoid assigning the generic 'Depreciation' line to COGS to prevent misclassification/double counting.

candidates.why: 'Depreciation' appears as a separate operating expense line above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows ('Selling expenses', 'Administrative expenses', 'Research and development expenses'). Under the same-level separate-line rule, this suggests it is not already embedded in those selected rows and should be added separately to the operating overhead bucket.

variables.notes: Selected because it is an explicit separate operating D&A row at the same level as the chosen SG&A components. Manual review is warranted because the label is generic and could, in principle, include depreciation not solely attributable to SG&A.
